prestazioni: Engine swap to L28E (2.8L inline-6, 170hp stock) with forged internals: JE 87mm forged pistons (9.0:1 CR), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from Tomei for 8,000 RPM reliability. Paired with a custom-built NISMO L28ET turbo kit featuring a Garrett GT35R turbo (0.82 A/R turbine housing), 38mm Tial wastegate, and a custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust with Burns Merge Collectors for optimized scavenging.

Fuel system upgrade: Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump, 850cc/min ID1000 injectors, and a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU with individual cylinder tuning and launch control. Custom intake manifold with velocity stacks and a K&N 14-inch conical air filter for improved airflow.

Suspension and drivetrain: BC Racing BR coilovers with Swift springs (8kg/mm front, 6kg/mm rear) and adjustable camber plates for aggressive stance. Cusco 2-way LSD (1.5/2.0) in a NISMO 7-speed close-ratio transmission with a Spec Stage 3+ clutch and lightweight flywheel. StopTech Big Brake Kit with 4-piston calipers, 328mm rotors, and Ferodo DS2500 pads for track-ready stopping power.
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny Version 3 widebody kit with custom carbon fiber front splitter, rear diffuser, and overfenders to fit 9.5-inch Enkei PF07 wheels (15x9 +15 front, 15x10 +20 rear) wrapped in Toyo R888R tires (225/50 front, 245/45 rear).

Custom livery by Fatlace Designs featuring a matte gunmetal base with metallic gold accents, including a hand-painted Z-car stripe and JDM-inspired kanji decals on the fenders. Full LED conversion with Philips X-tremeUltinon bulbs and custom Hella headlight housings for a modernized look.

Interior overhaul with Bride Zeta III seats (fixed-back, carbon fiber shell) wrapped in Alcantara and Nappa leather, paired with a Nardi Classic 380mm steering wheel. Custom roll cage by AutoPower Industries (8-point, bolt-in) with powder-coated red finish, and a full digital dash from AIM MXS Strada with data logging for track telemetry.
